overrideDescriptionKey.english: Restore friendly units to full health and grant +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.french: Restaure tous les PV des unités alliées et confère +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.german: Stellt die volle Gesundheit von verbündeten Einheiten wieder her und gewährt +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.russian: Восстанавливает здоровье союзников до максимума и дает +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.portuguese: Restaura toda a vida das unidades aliadas e concede +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese: 完全恢复所有友方单位的生命值并使其获得 +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
overrideDescriptionKey.spanish: Restaura toda la salud de las unidades aliadas y añade +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health].
overrideDescriptionKey.chinese_traditional: 恢復友方單位至滿血並賦予+[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]。
overrideDescriptionKey.korean: 아군 유닛들의 체력을 완전히 회복하고 +[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]을 부여합니다.
overrideDescriptionKey.japanese: 味方ユニットの体力を全回復し、+[effect1.upgrade.bonushp][health]を付与する。
